s: In 2002, John Foster suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 10.800, WHIP 2.400, SO 6, WAR -0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (ATL -> MIL).

Changed teams after the previous season (MIL -> ATL).
